_schema_notes.quiz_progress: Keyed by 'module-N'. Each module has levels keyed by 'level-N'. Each level has: completed (bool), concepts (object mapping concept slug to array of scores), average (number or null), feedback (string or null — user's freeform feedback after completing the level)
_schema_notes.concept_scores: Each concept maps to an array of scores (0-10). Multiple scores mean the concept was tested more than once. Average is recalculated from all concept averages after each answer. 7 scored concepts (at least one score each) completes a level.
